check.action: Halt with the git push error verbatim.

substep.title: Compose PR Body
substep.action:
Build the PR body from the bundle. Include: - Link to parent ticket: [[{{ticket_alias}}]] - Brief summary (1-2 sentences from ticket frontmatter `topic`) - Verification gate summary (which gates have run + verdicts) - Link to bundle: {{bundle_dir}}
Format as standard markdown. Do not include implementation narrative — the implementation log is in the bundle and the plan; the PR body is a pointer, not a duplicate.

check.action: Halt with the gh error verbatim.

substep.title: Persist Initial State
substep.action: Write {bundle_dir}/pr-cycle-state.md with initial state (see step 8 for format).
